closure_definition: Every corpus file is reviewed and every atomic idea has source evidence plus a closed, validated disposition.

source_catalog.ROADMAP: extracted/Roadmap for Building the Gaudi MVP Architectural Design Foundation Model.txt

coverage.method: verified full-text twin plus direct figure inspection
sequential section pass plus adversarial capability/TODO search
byte/line-equivalence check against Part-1 primary extract
direct visual inspection at high/original resolution
full heading, protocol, checklist and action-item pass
semantic diff against primary variant plus standalone-only review
cross-check against corresponding primary-extract line ranges

ideas.statement: Represent CAD edits as typed, serializable, executable operations rather than free-form geometry prose.
Run operation streams behind a swappable geometry-kernel interface with a dependency-free fake.
Model sketches with explicit primitives, constraints and residual degrees of freedom.
Support editability-first solid features including extrude, revolve, fillet, chamfer, holes, shell, loft, sweep, patterns and mirror.
Make dimensions editable through parameter mutation followed by deterministic replay.
Represent assemblies as part instances, rigid transforms and mate constraints with residual DOF.
Detect static part interference and collision in assemblies.
Validate mechanism mobility, travel limits and one-way motion intent.
Use plural verification for sketch, B-rep, assembly, DFM, requirements, standards and reference fidelity.
Repair invalid B-reps and rank explicit repair suggestions instead of only rejecting geometry.
Formalize natural-language requirements into machine-checkable constraints and ask for missing information.
Create a top-down master-sketch/skeleton before detailed feature generation.
Provide first-principles engineering sizing assistance for shafts, plates and bolts.
Express acceptance criteria as a reusable machine-verifiable design contract.
Ingest versioned engineering clauses into typed rules with citations and conflict detection.
Measure volume, mass, center of mass, stock, material cost, machining cost and BOM.
Include embodied carbon and energy in design estimates and optimization objectives.
Import STEP, IGES and STL references, extract metadata and decompile recognizable features.
Measure round-trip information loss between imported and rebuilt geometry.
Reconcile model metrics, drawing annotations and reference metadata through persistent correspondence IDs.
Maintain append-only operation history with checkpoints, bisect, branches and three-way merge.
Produce semantic operation/geometry diffs and requirement-to-feature traceability.

sources.locator: IntentGraph token diffs and visual Git log

ideas.statement: Generate dimensioned 2D engineering drawings and title blocks from model facts.
Serialize operation history, feature relations and diagnostics into deterministic visual JSON/SVG.
Support approval-gated multi-turn edits with preview, semantic diff, stale-base protection and rollback.
Provide a keyboard-first, mode-aware command grammar producing typed CAD intents without shell execution.
Validate sketch/image attachments with provenance, type, size, hash and path confinement behind a provider-neutral encoder seam.
Rank state-valid next CAD operations with reasons, confidence and top-k metrics.
Search design variants with best-of-N, Reflexion, MCTS and Pareto/Elo ranking.
Run analytic beam, pressure-vessel and buckling checks through a pluggable solver interface.
Orchestrate simulation jobs with deterministic IDs, cache, retry, timeout, cancellation and solver provenance.
Plan collision-aware assembly and disassembly sequences and verify service-tool access.

sources.locator: construction sequencing and access transfer principles

ideas.statement: Secure local ingestion with allowlisted formats, root confinement, metadata redaction, hashes and audit provenance.
Block prompt-injection patterns and enforce explicit tool allowlists and trust tiers.
Expose a transactional adapter contract with capability discovery, idempotency and apply/verify/commit/rollback.
Retrieve similar verified precedents and return an explicitly approximate fallback after failure.
Capture consented modeling events aligned to proposed, accepted, adjusted and rejected operations.
Convert human edit deltas into inspectable preference-training records.
Audit operation, family, source, geography, process and geometry-family distribution skew.
Generate synthetic parametric samples, augment them and retain only solver-verified outputs.
Benchmark execution, editability, geometry validity, dimensions, assembly and time to feasibility.
Track spans, token/cost/latency, confidence intervals, failure taxonomy and replay.
Report mass, cost, carbon, energy and BOM deltas between design revisions.
Coordinate specialized designer, modeler, verifier, DFM, red-team and reviewer roles with halt authority.
Expose typed CAD operations through MCP-style tool schemas, approval tiers and an event stream.
Gate research claims on source evidence, result consistency, reproducibility and independent reviewer ensembles.
Checkpoint research stages and rollback failed literature, experiment-design or quality gates.
Run a trained program head, B-rep diffusion head and assembly head with learned solver recycling.
ideas.rationale: Requires curated training corpora, GPU training, model evaluation and learned weights; deterministic runtime seams are already present.

ideas.statement: Train editable T-spline generation with topology, continuity and parametric-intent heads.
ideas.rationale: Requires a T-spline representation, scarce labeled corpus, differentiable constraints and substantial model training.

ideas.statement: Reconstruct editable features from video, scans and point clouds.
ideas.rationale: Requires aligned multimodal datasets and trained perception/reconstruction models; session-event capture is implemented separately.

ideas.statement: Run production finite-element meshing and solve through CalculiX or Elmer.
ideas.rationale: Requires an installed external solver, mesher, validated material/load models and numerical correlation; analytic checks and the solver/job protocol are implemented.

ideas.statement: Generate production CAM toolpaths and machine simulation.
ideas.rationale: Requires machine/postprocessor definitions, tooling libraries and collision-validated CAM infrastructure outside this repository.

ideas.statement: Perform federated model training or secure clean-room computation over proprietary CAD.
ideas.rationale: Requires multi-party infrastructure, cryptographic/security controls, partner environments and trained models; local policy/redaction boundaries are implemented.

ideas.statement: Ship native writeback connectors for proprietary Revit, SolidWorks, Fusion or Onshape hosts.
ideas.rationale: Requires licensed host installations, vendor SDK credentials and integration environments; the transactional adapter contract and fake host are implemented.

ideas.statement: Ship a browser-based interactive solid-modeling canvas and confidence/constraint overlays.
ideas.rationale: Requires a separate frontend application and rendering/editor stack; stable SSE, approval, command and graph-view contracts are implemented.

ideas.statement: Train a learned next-operation model from modeling-session data.
ideas.rationale: Requires a sufficiently large consented session corpus, model selection and offline evaluation; heuristic ranking, metrics and capture are implemented.

ideas.statement: Build an automated literature citation graph that discovers sparse novelty regions.
ideas.rationale: Requires live Semantic Scholar/arXiv indexing and citation data; evidence gates are implemented but network literature harvesting is a separate tool.

ideas.statement: Treat speculative market domination, financing, off-planet construction and investor portal proposals as CAD runtime requirements.
ideas.rationale: These are business narratives without a distinct testable text-to-CAD mechanism.

ideas.statement: Run heavyweight autonomous research pipelines that fabricate or substitute unverified experiments.
ideas.rationale: The skills explicitly warn against fake experiments and heavyweight pipelines; only evidence-grounded governance components were adopted.

ideas.statement: Replace the current geometry kernel with a new Rust-native B-rep kernel.
ideas.rationale: A kernel rewrite is a separate multi-year geometry project; the existing backend protocol preserves the option without pretending it is implemented.

ideas.statement: Represent design intent with explicit causal, spatial, functional and reference relations.
Expose calibrated confidence and evidence reasons as frontend-neutral feature overlays.
Decompose CAD annotation into scoped expert and non-expert tasks tied to available evidence.
Report effect sizes and uncertainty intervals rather than significance claims alone.
Parse and spatially index arbitrary DXF files for native rule verification.
ideas.rationale: Robust DXF parsing and indexing require ezdxf or another maintained format implementation; generic rules, anomaly checks and reports are implemented without pretending to cover the format.

ideas.statement: Perform true topology optimization against structural objectives.
ideas.rationale: A defensible topology optimizer requires meshing, repeated validated physics solves and manufacturing constraints; parameter/Pareto exploration exists but is not mislabeled topology optimization.

ideas.statement: Convert bidirectionally between editable parametric histories and arbitrary meshes.
ideas.rationale: Mesh-to-feature inference is an unsolved reconstruction problem requiring learned/geometric decomposition; import and best-effort decompile cover only recognizable structured cases.
